title: cr AI Mission to future
description: In a move to position the state as a global technology hub, CM Nayab Singh Saini presented the budget featuring a total outlay of Rs 2,23,658.17 crore. This 10.28% increase over the previous year is anchored by the ambitious Haryana AI Mission, a strategic initiative designed to integrate Artificial Intelligence into governance and future-proof the state’s workforce.

title: As Maduro and Khamenei Learned, It’s Harder Than Ever for Leaders to Hide
description: A surge in sensors and cameras, combined with artificial intelligence, has transformed the U.S. intelligence’s ability to locate foreign heads of state. Add to that an American president willing to capture or kill.

title: Claude Tops ChatGPT in Apple App Store
description: Even as the company faces fresh scrutiny following the Pentagon's decision to end a contract with the firm, Anthropic's Claude has surged to the top of Apple's app rankings, overtaking OpenAI's ChatGPT in a closely watched race among artificial intelligence assistants.

title: OVN LLC Begins a New Chapter: AI as a Strategic Partner in Modern Logistics
description: ELK GROVE VILLAGE, Ill., March 02, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- In today’s logistics landscape, artificial intelligence is no longer a distant concept.
